title: Karpatiosorbus alnifrons
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus alnifrons is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a member of the genus Karpatiosorbus, which is part of the larger family of rose plants. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. Karpatiosorbus alnifrons is often classified as a hybrid between Sorbus aucuparia and another Sorbus species, although the exact hybridization is still a matter of research. Further classification and research are needed to fully understand the evolutionary history of this plant.
